programs.title: Gg: Spawn Squad
programs.sub_title: Flying Into Kirby Air Riders with Zac!
programs.desc: Zac and Gem take a first look at Kirby Air Riders! Exploring new game mechanics, strange control schemes and epic new courses, this episode has everything you need to know about the new racer!

programs.title: Dance With Tom
programs.desc: Tom teaches a Mibunn dance. Mibunn is the Yugambeh word for Wedge Tail Eagle, which flies high and wide, watching over all the creatures of the land. Join Tom in a Mibunn dance to look over and protect the land!

programs.title: Numberblocks
programs.desc: Thirty-Six and Forty-Five are exploring the Forest of Tens, on a quest for Ten. But what is the special something they need to find and bring to Ten?

programs.title: Odd Squad
programs.desc: The agents bring someone with an odd problem back to headquarters.

programs.title: Our Animals
programs.desc: Koalas are a special type of marsupial that live high in the canopy of gum trees where they eat leaves and sleep for most of the day.

programs.title: Operation Ouch!
programs.desc: Dr Xand gets in a spin to show you why you get dizzy, the Flying Doctors help a new baby in Australia and Dr Raph takes an icy dip when he meets a Brilliant Body who swims in the Antarctic.
